title: orobus canescens var. filiformis
intro: Orobus canescens var. filiformis, also known as the mountain clover, is a perennial legume native to mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orobus canescens var. filiformis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in the form of tincture or dried flowers for medicinal purposes.
